things.name: Backa Topola Town Square
things.description: The central square of this Vojvodina market town with its neo-baroque Town Hall, surrounded by cafes and the daily social life of the community

things.name: Vojvodina Plains Cycling Route
things.description: The flat Vojvodina plain around Backa Topola offers excellent cycling through sunflower fields, vineyards and traditional Serbian village landscapes

things.name: Local Harvest Festival
things.description: Annual harvest and folk culture festival celebrating the agricultural traditions of the Backa region with music, dance and traditional Vojvodina cuisine

things.name: Subotica (Day Trip)
things.description: The magnificent Art Nouveau city of Subotica with its extraordinary Town Hall and Synagogue is just 30km from Backa Topola; essential visiting

things.name: Palic Lake
things.description: Beautiful lake resort 35km from Backa Topola with swimming beaches, a casino, the famous Palic Film Festival venue and Art Nouveau architecture

things.name: Reformed Church Backa Topola
things.description: Historic Reformed (Calvinist) church reflecting the significant Hungarian community of the Backa Topola area in northern Vojvodina

things.name: Local Market
things.description: Weekly open-air market selling fresh local produce, traditional Vojvodina cheeses, paprika products and homemade rakija from local distillers

things.name: Novo Orahovo Winery
things.description: One of the Vojvodina wine estates near Backa Topola producing quality local wines from varieties adapted to the continental climate of the Pannonian plain

things.name: Kanjiza and Tisa River
things.description: The Tisa river flows through the Vojvodina countryside 40km from Backa Topola, with beaches, fishing and summer recreation along its wide, lazy banks

things.name: TSC Backa Topola Stadium
things.description: Home of TSC Backa Topola, who made history in 2023 by reaching the UEFA Conference League group stage as a newly promoted Serbian club
